name: Viper's Grudge
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>毒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>怨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>念</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Non-Reptile monsters you control cannot attack, also you cannot activate their effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Viper's Grudge" once per turn. If a face-up Reptile monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Reptile monster from your Deck. If this card is destroyed in the Spell & Trap Zone: You can return all your banished Reptile monsters to your GY.
eff: Non-Reptile monsters you control cannot attack, also you cannot activate their effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Viper's Grudge" once per turn. If a face-up Reptile monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Reptile monster from your Deck. If this card is destroyed in the Spell & Trap Zone: You can return all your banished Reptile monsters to your GY.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
